title: AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIOS OF KILIKILI, ACEDILLO, DAGUM, TOMALEGUIS, NIJAGA, RIZAL, LIMARAYON, CACARANSAN, MALOPALO, SAN ISIDRO, BANTE, AMAMPACANG, BANTIAN, SALVACION, PEffA, CAGNIPA, BINALEW, NABANG, QUEZON, CABACONGAN, SINIDMAN OR., LONGSOB, QUIRINO, BOHANG, CAGBILWANG, AND ROXAS IN THE CITY OF CALBAYOG.

chunks.text:
H. No. 586 / 55 OG No. 36, 7623 (September 7, 1959)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 2466, June 21, 1959 ]

AN ACT CREATING THE BARRIOS OF KILIKILI, ACEDILLO, DAGUM, TOMALEGUIS, NIJAGA, RIZAL, LIMARAYON, CACARANSAN, MALOPALO, SAN ISIDRO, BANTE, AMAMPACANG, BANTIAN, SALVACION, PEffA, CAGNIPA, BINALEW, NABANG, QUEZON, CABACONGAN, SINIDMAN OR., LONGSOB, QUIRINO, BOHANG, CAGBILWANG, AND ROXAS IN THE CITY OF CALBAYOG.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without executive approval, June 21, 1959.
